turns.content: What tasks do I have due this week?

📋 **SUMMARY:** None of your 61 open Asana tasks have due dates set.

🔍 **ANALYSIS:** All tasks are open but undated — no formal deadlines assigned to any of them. However, based on this week's calendar (Feb 11–15) and task content, here are the **time-sensitive ones I'd flag:**

**Valentine's Day (Feb 14) — 3 days away:**
- 🩷 **Vday Letter** — needs to be done before Saturday
- 🍳 **Valentine's Day Cooking** — meal planning/prep needed soon

**Other tasks worth prioritizing this week:**
- 📞 **Call Jesse** — ongoing
- 👟 **Buy new shoes** / **Buy underwear** — shopping errands
- 🎁 **Gift card shopping** — may be Valentine's related

📊 **STATUS:** 61 open tasks, 0 with due dates. Consider adding due dates to time-sensitive items.

➡️ **NEXT:** Want me to set due dates on the Valentine's tasks (Feb 13–14) and any others you'd like to target this week?

🗣️ Kaya: No due dates set on any tasks. Valentine's letter and cooking are most time-sensitive this week.
